page.title: Create execution
page.description: Import patients, choose the Playwright Project and bot details, configure the run, and submit when everything is ready.

patients.title: Patients
patients.description: Select the client, clinic, and execution day to import the patients for this run.

bot.title: Bot
bot.description: Pick the Playwright Project and associated bot, then update the execution bot fields before submission.

config.title: Execution config
config.description: Choose the runtime settings that complete the payload.

review.title: Review & submit
review.description: Confirm the payload preview before posting it to the API.

patients.description: Choose a clinic and CC execution day to import patients.
patients.patientDescription: Every patient row becomes one item in execution.patients.

config.description: These fields complete the execution and config sections of the request body.
config.modeDescription: Choose how this execution should run.
config.verificationDescription: Select the verification type to send to the API.
config.flagsDescription: Enable only the options needed for this run.
config.inNetworkDescription: Sets config.in-network to true when this execution should stay in network.
config.shortFormDescription: Sets config.shortForm to true when the short form should be used.
config.claimsFormDescription: Sets config.claimsForm to true when the claims form should be included.

buttons.copyPayloadFailed: Could not copy the payload to the clipboard

validation.customerHasNoClinics: The selected client has no clinics available.
validation.futureDateTime: Choose a future date and time.
validation.positiveNumber: Enter a whole number greater than zero.
validation.nonNegativeNumber: Enter a whole number of zero or greater.
validation.exceedsMax: Enter a whole number no greater than {{max}}.
validation.userRequired: Wait for the signed-in user to load before submitting.
validation.submitBlockedFallback: Review the wizard and complete the missing required fields before creating the execution.
validation.addPatient: Add at least one patient before continuing.
validation.patientDetailsDescription: Fill the missing imported fields before creating the execution: {{fields}}.
validation.clinicBotsTitle: Clinic bots could not be loaded
validation.noActiveClinicBots: The selected clinic has no active bots available.
validation.playwrightProjectsTitle: Playwright Projects could not be loaded
validation.associatedBotsTitle: Associated bots could not be loaded
validation.noAssociatedBots: The selected Playwright Project has no active associated bots available.
validation.selectedBotNotInClinicBots: The selected bot doesn't exist in the selected clinic's bots.
validation.decryptClinicBotPasswordTitle: Bot password could not be decrypted
validation.executionDaysTitle: Execution days could not be loaded

help.customerMinCharacters: Type at least 2 characters to search for a client.
help.selectClientAndClinicFirst: Select a client and clinic in the patients step before choosing a bot.
help.selectBotToEdit: Select a bot to load its default execution settings.
help.selectClientFirst: Select a client to load its clinics.
help.loadingClinics: Loading clinics for the selected client...
help.loadClinicsError: The selected client's clinics could not be loaded.
help.selectClinic: Choose one of the clinics available for this client.
help.noActiveClinicBots: This clinic has no active bots available. Choose a different clinic to continue.
help.noAssociatedBots: This Playwright Project has no active associated bots. Choose a different project to continue.
help.noImportedPatients: Select an execution day to import patients and continue.
help.readonlyFieldTooltip: This value is loaded from the selected bot and cannot be edited.

review.payloadDescription: This is the exact body the wizard will send to POST /executions.

submit.errorDescription: The request failed. Review the payload and try again.

success.title: Execution created
success.description: The execution was posted successfully and the response is ready to review.
success.alertDescription: You can start another execution right away without leaving this page.

sidebar.title: Executions
sidebar.loadErrorDescription: Try again to refresh the executions list.
sidebar.scheduledStartedToastDescription: Execution {{execution}} reached its scheduled start time.
sidebar.deleteDescription: This deletes {{execution}} when it is not running.

list.title: All executions
list.description: Review and search for any created execution.
list.loadErrorDescription: Try again to refresh the executions table.
list.patientsDialogDescription: Review the patients stored for execution {{execution}}.
list.botDialogDescription: Review the robot information stored for execution {{execution}}.
list.noPatients: No patients are stored for this execution.
list.noBot: No robot information is stored for this execution.

detail.title: Execution details
detail.subtitle: {{botName}} - {{execution}}
detail.loadErrorTitle: Execution details could not be loaded
detail.loadErrorDescription: The realtime log connection is still active, so logs will appear here if the worker sends them.
detail.patientDetailsDescription: Review the full patient information stored for this execution.
detail.debugDescription: Inspect the raw execution payload and the current client-side runtime snapshot for this execution.
detail.snapshotDescription: Includes the latest status, websocket state, and log buffering details known by the page.
detail.stopDescription: This asks the worker to stop the current execution. Logs may continue briefly while the stop request is processed.
detail.stopErrorDescription: The stop request failed. Check whether the execution is still running and try again.
detail.pauseErrorDescription: The pause request failed. Check whether the execution is still running and try again.
detail.resumeErrorDescription: The resume request failed. Check whether the execution is paused and try again.
detail.runNowErrorTitle: Scheduled execution could not be started
detail.runNowErrorDescription: The run-now request failed. Check whether the scheduled execution can still be promoted and try again.
detail.rerunDescription: A new execution will be created with the same payload as this finished run.
detail.rerunUnavailableDescription: This finished execution can be reviewed, but the stored details are not complete enough to recreate the original payload.
detail.rerunMissingFieldsDescription: The following fields are required to recreate this execution, but they are missing from the stored execution details.
detail.rerunErrorDescription: The rerun request failed. Review the original execution details and try again.
detail.logsDescription: Realtime command output for this execution.
detail.reportErrorTitle: Execution report could not be loaded
detail.reportErrorDescription: The HTML report is unavailable. Review the execution history for details.
detail.noLogsDescription: Command output will appear here as soon as it is available.
